title: check pass falsely warns of undriven wire

features.name: output wire driven only by submodule instance port
features.description: Code should include an output wire that is driven exclusively through a submodule instantiation's port connection, with no assign or always block driving it directly

features.name: comma-separated multi-instance declaration driving output slices
features.description: Code should include multiple instances of the same module declared in a comma-separated instantiation list, where each instance drives a different bit slice of a shared output wire

features.name: hierarchical module with combinational case statement
features.description: Code should include a submodule implementing a combinational lookup table using a full case statement inside an always @(*) block with nonblocking assignments
